commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: “Where there is pride, there will also be disgrace” because the proud conduct themselves disgracefully through contempt or ignorance of discipline, or because they bring disgrace upon their neighbors, or, in any event, “because all who exalt themselves will be humbled.” .

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Wisdom. God resists the proud, chap. xvi. 18., and xviii. 12., and James iv. 6.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
